title: Aura Cpvp Pack
description: This texture pack is a Crystal Player Versus Player pack with customised sounds to make cpvp sound more calming and aestethic.
body: The ACP (aura cpvp pack) is a clean, default-inspired CPvP texture pack designed for competitive PvP with a touch of aesthetic flair. It keeps Minecraft’s classic look while optimizing for smooth combat and refreshing your gameplay with custom, calming sounds.
